query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, u.isActive, u.alunoId, u.programId, u.openId, u.loginMethod 
FROM users u 
WHERE u.role = 'manager' 
ORDER BY u.id DESC 
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, u.isActive, u.alunoId, u.programId, u.openId, u.loginMethod 
FROM users u 
WHERE u.role = 'manager' 
ORDER BY u.id DESC 
LIMIT 20;
